revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: '[[:Category:6世紀の日本|← 6世紀]] | [[:Category:8世紀の日本|8世紀 →]] {{portal|日本}} [[7世紀]]の[[日本]]のカテゴリ。 {{Co...'
revision.text:
[[:Category:6世紀の日本|← 6世紀]] | [[:Category:8世紀の日本|8世紀 →]] {{portal|日本}} [[7世紀]]の[[日本]]のカテゴリ。 {{Commons category|Japan in the 7th century}}
[[Category:7世紀の各国|にほん]] [[Category:各世紀の日本]] [[Category:7世紀のアジア史|にほん]] [[Category:古墳時代]] [[Category:飛鳥時代]]

[[:Category:6世紀の日本|← 6世紀]] | [[:Category:8世紀の日本|8世紀 →]] {{portal|日本}} [[7世紀]]の[[日本]]のカテゴリ。 {{Commons category|Japan in the 7th century}}
[[Category:7世紀の各国|にほん]] [[Category:各世紀の日本|07]] [[Category:7世紀のアジア史|にほん]] [[Category:古墳時代]] [[Category:飛鳥時代]]

revision.comment: link to category on Commons is now defined on wikidata
1 revision imported: importing wikipedia
fixing the uncategorized categories error
Adding [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:making categorization show up on newly imported categories and templates]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:1 revision imported]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:1 revision imported]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "qq" to "11"
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (3 members)
Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 15:18:56
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Bot: append metadata & Tier-2 tag
Text replacement - "Tier 2 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"
Bot: append metadata & Tier-2 tag
Text replacement - "[[commons" to "[[Category:Tier 3 Categories with commons links]][[commons"
Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]][[Category:tier 3 Categories with enwiki]]"
Text replacement - "[[en:" to "[[Category:Tier 3 Categories with enwiki]][[en:"
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
revision.text: {{Portal|Japan}} {{Navseasoncats}} {{Commons category}} [[Category:7th century by country|Japan]] [[Category:Centuries in Japan|07]] [[Category:7th century in Asia|Japan]] [[Category:1st millennium in Japan]] [[Category:Asuka period]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories with enwiki]][[en:Category:7th century in Japan]] [[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]][[Category:tier 3 Categories with enwiki]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[ja:Category:7世紀の日本]] [[ar:Category:اليابان في القرن 7]] [[az:Category:VII əsrdə Yaponiya]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories with commons links]][[commons:Category:Japan in the 7th century]] [[es:Category:Japón en el siglo VII]] [[fa:Category:ژاپن در سده ۷ (میلادی)]] [[fr:Category:Japon au VIIe siècle]] [[hy:Category:7-րդ դարը Ճապոնիայում]] [[ko:Category:7세기 일본]] [[mr:Category:जपानमधील ७वे शतक]] [[pt:Category:Século VII no Japão]] [[simple:Category:7th century in Japan]] [[sv:Category:Japan under 600-talet]] [[tr:Category:7. yüzyılda Japonya]] [[uk:Category:VII століття в Японії]] [[ur:Category:جاپان میں ساتویں صدی]] [[zh:Category:7世纪日本]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories]][[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]

adding dummy category to make categories work
